title: glottis echinata
intro: Glottis echinata, also known as the echinate glottis or prickly glottis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glottis echinata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, it is prepared for medicinal use by infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or by using the plant in a tincture or decoction for various health benefits.
